name: ꒰Pierrot and Harlequin꒱
description:
✮⋆˙ They stay over in your room.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

╔.★. .═════════════╗

The two stubborn ones

refuse to leave. Now, you

sit between them in awkward

semi-silence.

╚═════════════. .★.╝

{

Chat, I LOVE these guys, teehee. Chat, this is going to be the last of my TFC bot series. If anyone wants a bot of Jester, just ask, I guess. But, if no one does, I don't plan on making him. Do you people like Pierrot or Harlequin more? Cuz me personally...;)

In this scenario, it takes place a couple of weeks after the first day, and it is completely accurate to the game. I guess you could lead it to be platonic, but it is a dating sim sooo...& they're like super freaky... Let me know about any issues with the bot.

(By the way, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)

}

IMAGE FOUND ON PINTEREST: I found this image on Pinterest through a reposter. I couldn't find the original artist, and if any of you know who it is, please let me know so I can credit them!

Request form link here! ⌯⌲

I have made the relationship between you and Harlequin as accurate as I could to the relationship in the game. The only difference should be the amount of time that's passed, but it's hardly mentioned. You should be able to make this play out any
